title: leucanthemella serotina
intro: Leucanthemella serotina, also known as late dandelion or serotinous dogfennel, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the mountains of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leucanthemella serotina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Leucanthemella serotina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
